config.classifiers:
<#if pbit0\-tc?has_content>
			    
			      cls0-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
                              ${filter\-operation}
	                      
			        scheduling-traffic-class
		                ${pbit0\-tc}
			      
                              <#if pbit\-index0\-cls0?has_content>
                		
                  		  ${pbit\-index0\-cls0}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls0?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls0}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls0?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls0}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls0?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls0}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls0?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls0}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls0?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls0}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls0?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls0}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls0?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls0}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls0?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls0}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
                	      <#if pbit\-index1\-cls0?has_content>
                		
                  		${pbit\-index1\-cls0}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls0?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls0}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls0?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls0}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls0?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls0}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls0?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls0}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls0?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls0}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls0?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls0}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls0?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls0}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls0?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls0}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
			    
			  </#if>
			  <#if pbit1\-tc?has_content>
			    
			      cls1-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
                              ${filter\-operation}
	                      
			        scheduling-traffic-class
		                ${pbit1\-tc}
			      
                              <#if pbit\-index0\-cls1?has_content>
                		
                  		  ${pbit\-index0\-cls1}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls1?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls1}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls1?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls1}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls1?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls1}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls1?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls1}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls1?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls1}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls1?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls1}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls1?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls1}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls1?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls1}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
                	      <#if pbit\-index1\-cls1?has_content>
                		
                  		${pbit\-index1\-cls1}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls1?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls1}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls1?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls1}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls1?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls1}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls1?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls1}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls1?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls1}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls1?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls1}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls1?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls1}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls1?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls1}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
			    
			  </#if>
                          <#if pbit2\-tc?has_content>
			    
			      cls2-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
                              ${filter\-operation}
	                      
			        scheduling-traffic-class
		                ${pbit2\-tc}
			      
                              <#if pbit\-index0\-cls2?has_content>
                		
                  		  ${pbit\-index0\-cls2}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls2?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls2}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls2?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls2}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls2?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls2}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls2?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls2}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls2?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls2}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls2?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls2}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls2?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls2}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls2?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls2}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
                	      <#if pbit\-index1\-cls2?has_content>
                		
                  		${pbit\-index1\-cls2}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls2?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls2}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls2?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls2}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls2?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls2}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls2?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls2}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls2?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls2}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls2?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls2}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls2?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls2}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls2?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls2}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
			    
			  </#if>
                          <#if pbit3\-tc?has_content>
			    
			      cls3-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
                              ${filter\-operation}
	                      
			        scheduling-traffic-class
		                ${pbit3\-tc}
			      
                              <#if pbit\-index0\-cls3?has_content>
                		
                  		  ${pbit\-index0\-cls3}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls3?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls3}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls3?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls3}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls3?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls3}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls3?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls3}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls3?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls3}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls3?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls3}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls3?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls3}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls3?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls3}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
                	      <#if pbit\-index1\-cls3?has_content>
                		
                  		${pbit\-index1\-cls3}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls3?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls3}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls3?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls3}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls3?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls3}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls3?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls3}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls3?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls3}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls3?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls3}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls3?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls3}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls3?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls3}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
			    
			  </#if>
                          <#if pbit4\-tc?has_content>
			    
			      cls4-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
                              ${filter\-operation}
	                      
			        scheduling-traffic-class
		                ${pbit4\-tc}
			      
                              <#if pbit\-index0\-cls4?has_content>
                		
                  		  ${pbit\-index0\-cls4}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls4?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls4}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls4?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls4}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls4?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls4}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls4?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls4}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls4?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls4}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls4?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls4}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls4?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls4}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls4?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls4}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
                	      <#if pbit\-index1\-cls4?has_content>
                		
                  		${pbit\-index1\-cls4}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls4?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls4}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls4?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls4}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls4?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls4}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls4?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls4}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls4?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls4}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls4?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls4}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls4?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls4}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls4?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls4}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
			    
			  </#if>
                          <#if pbit5\-tc?has_content>
			    
			      cls5-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
                              ${filter\-operation}
	                      
			        scheduling-traffic-class
		                ${pbit5\-tc}
			      
                              <#if pbit\-index0\-cls5?has_content>
                		
                  		  ${pbit\-index0\-cls5}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls5?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls5}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls5?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls5}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls5?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls5}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls5?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls5}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls5?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls5}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls5?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls5}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls5?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls5}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls5?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls5}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
                	      <#if pbit\-index1\-cls5?has_content>
                		
                  		${pbit\-index1\-cls5}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls5?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls5}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls5?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls5}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls5?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls5}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls5?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls5}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls5?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls5}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls5?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls5}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls5?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls5}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls5?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls5}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
			    
			  </#if>
                          <#if pbit6\-tc?has_content>
			    
			      cls6-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
                              ${filter\-operation}
	                      
			        scheduling-traffic-class
		                ${pbit6\-tc}
			      
                              <#if pbit\-index0\-cls6?has_content>
                		
                  		  ${pbit\-index0\-cls6}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls6?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls6}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls6?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls6}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls6?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls6}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls6?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls6}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls6?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls6}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls6?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls6}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls6?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls6}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls6?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls6}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
                	      <#if pbit\-index1\-cls6?has_content>
                		
                  		${pbit\-index1\-cls6}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls6?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls6}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls6?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls6}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls6?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls6}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls6?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls6}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls6?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls6}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls6?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls6}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls6?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls6}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls6?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls6}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
			    
			  </#if>
                          <#if pbit7\-tc?has_content>
			    
			      cls7-${pbit\-scheduling\-policy\-name}
                              ${filter\-operation}
	                      
			        scheduling-traffic-class
		                ${pbit7\-tc}
			      
                              <#if pbit\-index0\-cls7?has_content>
                		
                  		  ${pbit\-index0\-cls7}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls7?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index0\-cls7}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls7?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index0\-cls7}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls7?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index0\-cls7}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls7?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index0\-cls7}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls7?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index0\-cls7}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls7?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index0\-cls7}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls7?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index0\-cls7}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls7?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index0\-cls7}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
                	      <#if pbit\-index1\-cls7?has_content>
                		
                  		${pbit\-index1\-cls7}
                  		  <#if pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls7?has_content>
                   	            ${pbit\-value0\-for\-index1\-cls7}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls7?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value1\-for\-index1\-cls7}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls7?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value2\-for\-index1\-cls7}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls7?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value3\-for\-index1\-cls7}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls7?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value4\-for\-index1\-cls7}
                                  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls7?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value5\-for\-index1\-cls7}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls7?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value6\-for\-index1\-cls7}
                  		  </#if>
                  		  <#if pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls7?has_content>
                    		    ${pbit\-value7\-for\-index1\-cls7}
                  		  </#if>
                		
                	      </#if>
			    
			  </#if>
